candidates.title: Candidate A - three work lights flash together
candidates.summary: Three accepted working-status lights pulse, then a small star and sparkle burst appear; reads as completed work without occupying the canvas permanently.
candidates.recommended_use: 今日工作完成 after three task lights are filled.
candidates.bounds: visible alpha contained inside 1024x1024; no canvas-edge contact

candidates.title: Candidate B - soft workbench stamp
candidates.summary: A happy/check reward sticker drops like a soft stamp, compresses, and releases star stickers; no text and no permanent sticker pile.
candidates.recommended_use: Sticker/stamp interpretation of 今日工作完成.
candidates.bounds: visible alpha contained inside 1024x1024; no canvas-edge contact

candidates.title: Candidate C - small rocket launch
candidates.summary: The accepted rocket sprite lifts off with a warm flame trail and restrained sparkles; most expressive option, still a short one-shot.
candidates.recommended_use: High-delight version when PM/Ethan want a larger celebration.
candidates.bounds: visible alpha contained inside 1024x1024; no canvas-edge contact

quality_checks: All generated numbered frames are 1024x1024 RGBA transparent PNG.
Preview GIFs composite frames on dark navy canvas for visual review only.
No text, watermark, external brand, or copyrighted character style is introduced.
The pack reuses accepted WorkTime Justin production assets to avoid style drift.
